title: Awanish Sinha
content:
Regional Managing Partner, Ontario
People.ContactEmail asinha@mccarthy.ca
Awi solves problems.
Awanish Sinha serves as the Firm's Regional Managing Partner, Ontario.
He advises clients in extraordinary circumstances involving political exposure, reputational risk and major public policy shifts. Leaders trust him to handle sensitive matters requiring judgment and discretion.
He is routinely ranked as an expert in public and regulatory law and was named to Canadian Lawyer’s list of the Top 25 Most Influential Lawyers in Canada.
Awi also serves on the board of Toronto International Film Festival (TIFF), supporting its mission to transform the way people see the world through film.
